case_title: SHERIDAN SAMPOGNARO VS. MATTHEW THOMAS JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-02-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MATTHEW THOMAS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF SHERIDAN SAMPOGNARO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW THOMAS JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF $3000 IN CASH COUNTED IN THE COURTROOM AND GIVEN TO THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPOGNARO, SHERIDAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,800.00 FILED BY SAMPOGNARO, SHERIDAN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, MATTHEW THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
